seoTitle: Dutton East vs Eastwood — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Dutton East and Eastwood. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Dutton East vs Eastwood: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dutton East and Eastwood.
heading: Dutton East vs Eastwood — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dutton East, South Australia and Eastwood, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Eastwood has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Dutton East (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dutton East or Eastwood safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dutton East has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Eastwood scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dutton East scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Eastwood scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dutton East or Eastwood?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Eastwood has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
